title: Inertial inhibitor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
The '''inertial inhibitor''' was a personal [[Acceleration compensator/Legends|inertial compensator]] worn on a belt in the period surrounding the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It eased the physical stresses of movement in combat, reducing reaction time for the wearer.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
